nepa_description__c: Environmental Impact Statement for the Denver TRACON Airspace Redesign. Analyzes noise impacts on approximately 340,000 residential units, air quality effects from altered flight paths, environmental justice implications for communities below new flight tracks, and cumulative impacts with Denver International Airport expansion.
nepa_purpose_need__c: The FAA must ensure the National Airspace System provides for the safe and efficient use of navigable airspace. Current Denver TRACON airspace structure was designed in 1976 and does not accommodate modern area navigation (RNAV) procedures or Performance-Based Navigation (PBN) routes. Redesign is needed to reduce delays, improve fuel efficiency, and distribute noise equitably across communities.
nepa_cooperating_agencies__c: U.S. Army Corps of Engineers; EPA Region 8; Colorado Parks and Wildlife
